description: Three Tasks tab improvements: transparent scrollbar in Board View, move-to dropdown in List View, and inline column editing in Board View with column badge on TaskCard.
steps: Add scrollbar-hide CSS utility to src/index.css and apply to BoardView container
Add onMove prop to TaskCard and ListView, implement move-to dropdown on TaskCard
Pass handleMove callback from Tasks.tsx to ListView
Add inline column editing to BoardView headers and add-column button
Show column name badge on TaskCard using useColumnStore
acceptance_criteria: Board view horizontal scrollbar is invisible but scroll still works
TaskCard shows a move-to dropdown on hover with available columns
ListView passes onMove through to TaskCard
Tasks.tsx handles move by calling moveTask from store
Board view column headers can be edited inline with pencil icon
Board view has a + button to add new columns
TaskCard shows a small column badge label
npm run build succeeds without errors
